violations.text: All food was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Date stickers were on site at the time of inspection. Establishment must have a method of date marking product. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

Cookies and calzones packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Self closing hinges were purchased and on site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/15/2024

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

Various calzones were observed held below 135 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was reheated. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

Various foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Date dot stickers were purchased. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

The door to the outside is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New screens were purchased and on site at the time of inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. Self closing hinges will be purchased. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

The FRP walls in the oven area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Facility is lacking stoppers. Stoppers have been purchased. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/07/2024

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. 3-bay poster provided. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Various foods were observed held below 135 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was reheated. Proper hot holding procedures reviewed with PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

Various foods were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

The door to the outside is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024

The FRP next to the oven is in poor repair. The coving was observed falling off of the walls. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The facility is lacking stoppers for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2024
